title: Verify the presence of the SyncMe logo at the top of the screen
test_steps: Open the SyncMe app and navigate to screen 10594. | Verify that the SyncMe logo is present at the top of the screen.
expected_result: The SyncMe logo is displayed at the top of the screen.

title: Verify the map section displays a map of North America with a red pin
test_steps: Open the SyncMe app and navigate to screen 10594. | Verify that the map section displays a map of North America with a red pin marking a location in the United States.
expected_result: The map section displays a map of North America with a red pin marking a location in the United States.

title: Verify the profile picture section displays a circular profile picture of Jennifer labeled as a 'Top model'
test_steps: Open the SyncMe app and navigate to screen 10594. | Verify that the profile picture section displays a circular profile picture of Jennifer labeled as a 'Top model'.
expected_result: The profile picture section displays a circular profile picture of Jennifer labeled as a 'Top model'.

title: Verify the presence of social media icons for Facebook, LinkedIn, and Google+
test_steps: Open the SyncMe app and navigate to screen 10594. | Verify that the social media icons for Facebook, LinkedIn, and Google+ are present below the profile picture.
expected_result: The social media icons for Facebook, LinkedIn, and Google+ are present below the profile picture.

title: Verify the call-to-action (CTA) button labeled 'GET STARTED' is clickable
test_steps: Open the SyncMe app and navigate to screen 10594. | Click on the 'GET STARTED' button. | Verify that clicking the 'GET STARTED' button navigates to the next screen.
expected_result: The 'GET STARTED' button is clickable and navigates to the next screen.

title: Verify the screen is accessible and usable
test_steps: Open the SyncMe app and navigate to screen 10594. | Perform a screen reader test to ensure all elements are accessible. | Perform a usability test to ensure the screen is easy to navigate and understand.
expected_result: All elements are accessible and the screen is easy to navigate and understand.
